hallucination.rationale: The note says 'swimming and dance lessons on weekends' but the transcript says swim lessons on Saturdays and dance class was just started (no mention of it being on weekends). The note says fear of dogs 'which she has overcome' — the transcript says the phase 'has resolved,' which is close but the note omits that the dark fear is managed with a nightlight. 'Follow-up on picky eating strategy and reassess in a few visits' is not stated in the transcript. Minor embellishments overall.
flagged_content: Follow-up on picky eating strategy and reassess in a few visits
swimming and dance lessons on weekends

instruction_following.rationale: Multiple template sections are missing entirely: Review of Systems, Past Medical History, Medications, Allergies, Social History, Family History, Vital Signs, and detailed Physical Examination findings. The template instructs to state 'Not documented' for missing items, which was not done. Physical exam findings were placed in the Subjective section rather than Objective.
